Extend the Aloha: Donate Your Beach Gear Before You Fly

Give Your Beach Gear a Second Life You came to Oahu for the sun, surf, and sand, and purchased gear to make the most of your time on the island, but by the end of your vacation you may be wondering what to do with the gear before you head home? It’s common for visitors […]

Give Your Beach Gear a Second Life

You came to Oahu for the sun, surf, and sand, and purchased gear to make the most of your time on the island, but by the end of your vacation you may be wondering what to do with the gear before you head home? It’s common for visitors to accumulate beach gear while on vacation here on the Hawaiian islands, and sadly, a lot of that gear goes to waste after people leave. Rather than tossing your perfectly good gear in the trash, consider donating it to Active Oahu where it can have a second life.

Give Back to the Island

At Active Oahu, we are passionate about protecting our islands, minimizing waste, and making outdoor adventures accessible and sustainable. Here is where you can help! When you donate your items to us, you are not only keeping Oahu clean and clutter-free, but you are also helping the next visitors and locals enjoy the island with your gear!

Items We Accept

We accept the following items in good working condition. If you are wondering if we will accept something not on the list feel free to give us a call or stop by our storefront in Kailua and we’d be happy to discuss it with you!

Beach Chairs

Beach Umbrellas

Bodyboards

Coolers

Snorkel Sets

Dry Bags

Why Donate to Active Oahu?

  • Reduce Waste: Hawaii struggles with the environmental impacts of tourism. Donating your gear is a simple way to make your trip more sustainable.

  • Support Our Community: Locals and visitors alike will enjoy your gear long after you leave your island getaway.

  • Convenient Drop Off: Located in Kailua, or location is easily accessible and the process is quick to make a drop off. Additionally, if you need to store some luggage with us until your flight takes off, we offer a luggage storage service through Bounce. Bring your luggage and spare gear to us and let us solve two of your problems at the same time!

Make a Booking Today!

Interested in learning more about our Bounce luggage storage service? Click this link to find out more information. https://activeoahutours.com/oahu-kayaking-and-beach-adventures/store-your-bags-explore-kailua-bounce-luggage-storage-service-available-at-active-oahu/

Looking into activities you can do while you are in Kailua or awaiting a flight home? Click this link to view our rental and tour options! https://activeoahutours.com/oahu-equipment-rentals/

Inspired to Explore?

Book your Oahu kayak, e-bike, or rental adventure with Active Oahu Tours today.
